title: Bathroom Curtains Shower 170 x 230 cm(67 x 91inch) Weighted Hem, Quick-Drying, Customizable, Bpa Free, with Hooks Bath Curtains Waterproof Peva Bath Curtains, Gray Waves
features: 🌌【Material】Made of 100% Polyester, Water Resistant, Durable, Quick Dry Fabric Curtains for Stall Shower. Crafted with premium fabric ensures the water beads gliding away quickly. Wipe Clean is available. long-last use and durability.

☔【Anti Mould and Waterproof】Our shower curtains are mould proof resistant, designed to maintain a fresh and clean environment. The water repellent properties ensure that the curtain dries quickly, reducing the risk of mold and mildew formation.
⛴️【Thoughtful Design】Weighted to keep solid shower curtain in place; can be used as stand-alone curtain or as a liner in combination with other curtain

🛰️【Polyester Fabric】Polyester fabric feels smooth and soft, breathable, and dries quickly, reducing the chance of mold growth. At the same time, it is very durable and does not easily react dangerously with detergents.

🌄【Eco Friendly】Our shower liner is made with odorless, PVC-free, non-toxic, no chlorine, eco-friendly,won’t expose your family and the environment to harmful chemical fumes,good and safe for your family health.

🛶【Easy Fit】Shower Curtain is easy to hang on shower rail using plastic rail hooks. Firm yet smooth texture along with vibrant colour range, the curtain is water repellent leaving it dry in minutes after shower and also helps maintain dry floor, bath, shower, wet room and area surrounding bath tub

⛱️【Multipurpose】Our hook shower curtain works well with straight or curved shower rods, It can not only easily fit most standard-sized bathtubs and bathrooms, but also can be used as a drape or room divider to protect privacy. An ideal choice for home, hotel, apartment, condo, camper, RV, dorm, athletic club, gym, beauty salon and so on.

🌅【Easy Clean】 The bathroom shower curtain can be hand and machine wash in cold water, just throw it in your washer, gentle cycle with mild detergent, then tumble-dry on a low heat setting or dry in a ventilated place. It will dry quickly. Don't use bleach.
description: 🌞Product Description The shower curtain can not only provide you with a comfortable shower experience, but also decorate your bathroom Using this shower curtain with thick and odorless, soft and comfortable texture, fashionable colors, elegant and opaque design, it can not only add a unique visual effect, but also bring you and your family a comfortable shower time 🌼Specifications: -- Material: 100% polyester fabric. -- Size: W x H (customizable) -- Color: as shown in the picture. -- Package: 1 * shower curtain, plastic hook (quantity depends on size, the hole interval is 15cm) 🍳Features: Effectively waterproof, mildew-proof, antibacterial, and isolate water vapor. 100% polyester fabric, no odor, harmful gas and chemical smell. The long shower curtain can be easily washed with a damp cloth and dried, the durable shower curtain is mildew-resistant, ensuring hygiene. 🌊Rust-proof metal hook eye Compared with other shower curtains, the rust-proof metal hook eye has a longer service life. It not only prevents rust, but also reduces the risk of the shower curtain stretching or tearing! Perfect for the bathroom. 🪀With a perfectly weighted hem Provides weight and added stability to keep the shower curtain in place. Won't float and stick to you. 🚁Easy to install Fits many standard sizes of bathroom showers or bathtubs, works with straight or curved shower rods. 🍩Note: 1.Due to light and screen differences, the item color may be slightly different from the pictures. 2.Please allow 1-2cm differences due to manual measurement. 📩After-sales service: If you encounter any problems during the use of the product, please feel free to consult us at any time. We have a professional team to solve the problem for you.
